title: Military expert flags 'concrete proof' Scottish airport is helping US bomb Iran

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Military expert flags 'concrete proof' Scottish airport is helping US bomb Iran. Glasgow Prestwick Airport is one of the airports used for military stopovers (Andrew Milligan/PA). USA Today logo.
